import pandas as pd

def validate_statement(df):
    # Check if the average cigarette consumption aligns with health impacts discussed
    average_cigarettes = df['average_cigarettes'].mean()
    return average_cigarettes > 10  # Adjust according to relevant thresholds

df = pd.read_csv("data.csv")  # Ensure your data file is correctly specified
result = validate_statement(df)
